[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001110 3
1 0000101 2
2 1100000 2
3 1010001 3
4 0110111 5
5 0101000 2
6 0111111 6
7 0001110 3

01 10 0011110 4
12 21 0110001 3
23 32 0001011 3
34 43 1100101 4
45 54 0110001 3
56 65 1100110 4
67 76 0111110 5
70 07 0101000 2 match 5

02 20 0101111 5
13 31 0111010 4
24 42 1101110 5
35 53 1010100 3
46 64 1010111 5
57 75 1011000 3
60 06 0010110 3
71 17 0110110 4

03 30 0100100 2
14 41 1011111 6
25 52 1011111 6
36 63 0110010 3
47 74 1101001 4
50 05 1110000 3
61 16 0001000 1
72 27 0000111 3

04 40 1000001 2
15 51 1101110 5
26 62 0111001 4
37 73 0001100 2
